overview.name: Auth Custom
overview.description:
This scenario verifies custom authentication flow using custom auth strategy.
Test flow includes: 1. Authenticate via auth command using custom auth class. 2. Send GET request to protected custom resource. 3. Verify response status = 200. 4. Validate protected response body. 5. Exit auth block. 6. Send GET request without authorization. 7. Verify response status = 401. 8. Reset custom auth state.
This scenario validates: - Custom auth login flow - Custom token extraction - Authorization header injection - Protected endpoint access - Unauthorized access without token

http.comment: Access protected custom resource with valid auth
Access protected custom resource without auth should fail
Reset custom auth state after test
